title: Khan Academy India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Khan Academy India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Khan Academy India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Khan Academy India:
Khan Academy India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khan Academy India!
